approval_context.purpose: authorized administrative reconciliation for the historical S05/T05 task-accounting mismatch

observed_gsd_status.boundary_condition: S05 is complete while one historical task remains pending.

milestone_validation_hold_reason: This reconciliation removes the administrative S05/T05 blocker only. M001 validation must remain blocked until strict live proof succeeds and the later S17 task explicitly updates this field.

canonical_code_test_remediation_evidence.summary: S15/T01 is the canonical source-code and test remediation evidence for the historical S05/T05 findings.

historical_task_provenance.summary: S05/T05 describes the original continuity and state-safety remediation contract whose source/test work was later completed in S15/T01.

validation_provenance.prior_status: needs-remediation because live proof remained incomplete and this administrative reconciliation had not yet been authorized

reconciliation_rationale: S05 was not reopened because gsd_slice_reopen would reset all S05 tasks and discard historical task-state continuity for completed work.
Direct database mutation is prohibited, so this artifact records an authorized administrative reconciliation without changing GSD task rows directly.
The complete-with-one-pending mismatch is represented explicitly rather than silently erased.
The administrative issue is no longer a milestone blocker, but R003 and R015 remain unvalidated until strict Docker live proof and Matrix readback succeed.
supported_state_mutation_reason: No GSD task row was directly changed; the supported action in S17/T01 is an operator-readable reconciliation artifact.

redaction_safety.notes: Only names, paths, statuses, counts, and requirement identifiers are recorded.

next_required_step: Run strict live proof in later S17 tasks, verify captured JPEG artifacts and room readback, then update milestone_validation_may_pass only after the proof succeeds.
